description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a weathered metallic barrel and a tan-colored upper receiver. The body is adorned with bold white lettering reading 'STORM X2' and is equipped with three large, black canisters attached beneath, each marked with a yellow hazard symbol. The weapon has a prominent, angular stock and a visible sighting device mounted on top. The grip and trigger area are reinforced with black and yellow hazard striping, giving it a rugged, tactical appearance. Exposed piping and mechanical details run along the length of the barrel, suggesting a high-powered, possibly pneumatic or gas-assisted firing mechanism.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial shotgun with a tan and black color scheme, three hazard-marked canisters, and bold 'STORM X2' branding. It features exposed piping, a reinforced grip, and a rugged, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the 'STORM X2' branding, three hazard-marked canisters, and detailed piping along the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the alignment of the canisters beneath, and the compact width of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with similar visibility of the canisters, branding, and mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, the back of the canisters, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun's design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced edges and no finger grooves
